{{Quote|Missiles armed!|Imperial Missile Launcher Trooper|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns]]''</ref>}}
The '''missile launcher troopers''', also known as '''anti-air troopers''', were troopers deployed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to defend against aerial ships. They were trained to have incredible accuracy and stamina, as they were required to carry a [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]] over long distances. '''Armored missile troopers''', or '''heavy anti-air troopers''', were a variant with two launchers.

==Uniform==
[[File:Imperial_Armored_Missile_Trooper.png|thumb|250px|Armored missile troopers.]]
Missile launcher troopers wore the standard [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Boot/Legends|boots]] worn by most [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperials]], in addition to a tan jumpsuit. They also wore pads on their knees and elbows, black gauntlets, as well as [[Armor/Legends|armor]] on their chest. A utility belt held most of their gear. A gray helmet outfitted with a chinstrap and goggles finished off the uniform. Anti-air troopers carried a [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]] for use against [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], while Heavy anti-air troopers carried two. These troopers were vulnerable against other troopers and ground vehicles.

==History==
Anti-air troopers were deployed on battlefields during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Gamemechanics}}
[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] ordered the recruitment of additional troopers from [[Barracks/Legends|troop centers]] during the war to use in battle against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]].
{{Endgame}}

==Behind the scenes==
Anti-air troopers are the Galactic Empire's anti-air unit in the [[2001]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]'' and its [[2002]] [[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds: Clone Campaigns|expansion pack]]. They are provided to the player in several missions during the Galactic Empire campaign, and more may be built at troop centers for 35 units of food and 35 units of [[Carbon/Legends|carbon]].
